---
name: Governed bounded work
about: Plan one bounded SCF work item through a durable GitHub Issue
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the bounded work item in one or two sentences.

## Objective

State the outcome this issue must produce.

## Governing authority

Identify the applicable authority, constraints, and development process.

## Scope

Define the high-level work boundary.

## Constraints

List constraints that govern implementation.

## Explicitly out of scope

State what this issue does not authorize or implement.

## Dependencies

Record strict dependencies, preferred ordering, and related issues with explicit
GitHub references.

## Deliverables

List the durable outputs required from this issue.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Each criterion is objective and verifiable.
- [ ] Completion evidence can be tied to repository, pull-request, validation,
      review, and merge records where applicable.

## Planning comments

After the issue body is stable, add exactly two designated comments:

1. `## Governed detailed scope`
2. `## Governed work breakdown and patch plan`

Use the repository templates for those comments. The issue body remains the
high-level scope record; the comments refine implementation and execution
without silently expanding this issue.
